args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(Opportunity.OwnerId,'#','')) AS OwnerId_clean,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(Contract.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(Opportunity.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity
JOIN Contract ON TRIM(REPLACE(Opportunity.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(Contract.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(Opportunity.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND Contract.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId_clean
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(Opportunity.OwnerId,'#','')) AS OwnerId_clean,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(Contract.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(Opportunity.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity
JOIN Contract ON TRIM(REPLACE(Opportunity.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(Contract.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(Opportunity.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND Contract.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId_clean
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
